# Sub-Level 41.2

### **Description**

Students reinforce multiplication tables through multiplication facts, table completion, and simple two-digit by one-digit multiplication.

### **Sections**

### **Section A: Multiplication Facts**

Examples

* 4 × 7 \= \_\_\_  
* 5 × 6 \= \_\_\_  
* 3 × 8 \= \_\_\_

### **Section B: Complete the Table**

| ×4 | Answer |
| ----- | ----- |
| 1 × 4 | 4 |
| 2 × 4 | \_\_\_ |
| 3 × 4 | 12 |
| 4 × 4 | \_\_\_ |
| 5 × 4 | \_\_\_ |

### **Section C: Two-Digit × One-Digit**

Examples

21 × 2  
14 × 3  
12 × 4
